summary: Phase 1 (Club SaaS merger: Subscription, Birthdays, Site theme/identity, Players birth_date) end-to-end testing. Backend: 12/12 new tests in test_phase1.py + 32/32 regression tests in backend_test.py all PASSED. Validated: username-based login (livanespor / case-insensitive 'Livanespor'), GET /api/admin/subscription auto-init Starter@30, PUT /admin/subscription/plan switching starter↔plus↔pro with balance reset and plan_change tx logged, POST /admin/subscription/credit-adjust add/deduct logging manual_adjust tx and clamped at 0, anonymous gating returns 401, GET /admin/dashboard/birthdays returns sorted list with days_until/turning_age (verified by creating TEST player with birth_date=today+3 days and observing them in result), extended /admin/dashboard/stats includes media_total + upcoming_birthdays + mackolik + subscription summaries, PUT /admin/site-settings persists short_name/primary_color/secondary_color/bg_color/instagram_username/default_theme. Frontend: admin login → /admin/dashboard renders new layout (Aktif Paket card with credit bar 32/30 over Starter, Mackolik success card, Yaklaşan Doğum Günleri showing 'Eren Cengiz #55 — 28 yaşına giriyor — 5 gün', stat cards, all 5 quick actions present), sidebar 'Paketim' nav with Package icon works, /admin/paketim shows current plan + 3 plan cards + manual credit ±  → tx list updates immediately, plan switch via UI via window.confirm dialog confirmed (Starter→Plus reflected), /admin/settings new sections (Kulüp Kimliği short_name, Tema&Renkler 3 color pickers + swatches + theme select, Instagram username) save and persist after reload (LIV / livanespor_ui retained), Players form has 'Doğum Tarihi (YYYY-MM-DD)' text field. No regressions on existing CRUD or public endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1280 lines — strongly recommend splitting into routers (auth, public, admin/subscription, admin/dashboard, admin/crud, ai, mackolik) and services modules; will keep PR diffs reviewable as Phase 2/3 add more SaaS surface area.

Subscription doc uses singleton id='main' which will need to become tenant-keyed (id=club_id) before multi-tenant rollout — flag this when Phase 1 ships single-club. consume_credit() helper is in place but not yet called by AI generate-image endpoint; wire it before launching credit metering.

Plan switching always resets credit_balance to monthly_credit_limit even on downgrade (e.g., Pro 487 left → Starter 30); fine semantics for first MVP but document for users (the current Turkish confirm message does communicate it).

PUT /admin/site-settings accepts arbitrary fields via GenericIn (no schema validation); for color/theme fields consider adding format validation (#RRGGBB regex, theme enum) to prevent invalid values reaching the frontend CSS layer.

_upcoming_birthdays only honors active!=False players and parses YYYY-MM-DD or first 10 chars of ISO; players with timestamp-style birth_date or missing field are silently skipped — acceptable, but a small logger.warn for parse failures would help debugging.
Frontend Paketim plan cards use window.confirm() — works but consider a styled dialog for consistency with the rest of the admin UI; not blocking.
test_credentials: username='livanespor' (case-insensitive) password='Livanespor2026' — verified from /app/memory/test_credentials.md and via successful login on both backend and frontend.
seed_data_creation: Subscription doc 'main' was toggled starter→plus→pro→starter and credit balance was bumped +5 then restored. Site-settings was overwritten with short_name='LIV', primary_color=#FFD700, secondary_color=#000000, bg_color=#0F0F0F, instagram_username='livanespor_ui', default_theme='dark' (and site_title='Livanespor TEST' from prior iteration still present). Transient TEST_BD_<id> player created with birth_date today+3 to validate birthday endpoint, then deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v (skip TestAIImage to save OpenAI credits via --deselect). New tests live in test_phase1.py covering Subscription/Birthdays/Site-settings extensions. All admin endpoints require Bearer JWT; use {email:'livanespor', password:'Livanespor2026'} (the 'email' field is the username). Window.confirm dialog appears when clicking plan-card-{plan} on Paketim — auto-accept via page.on('dialog', d.accept()). data-testid map: admin-login-{email,password,submit}, admin-nav-paketim, paketim-{page,current-plan,plan-name,credit-balance,adjust-amount,credit-add,credit-deduct,transactions}, plan-card-{starter,plus,pro}, dashboard-{subscription-card,mackolik-card,birthdays}, stat-* (10 cards), quick-{haber-ekle,oyuncu-ekle,ai-görsel-üret,mackolik-sync,paketim}, settings-{short-name,primary-color,secondary-color,bg-color,default-theme,instagram-username,save}.
rca of the issue: No defects. Initial-attempt UI plan switch did not appear to take effect because window.confirm dialog was not auto-accepted; resolved by registering page.on('dialog', lambda d: d.accept()) — backend test_set_plan_plus_then_starter independently verified the API path.
